narrative_texts.interpretation: Promotion readiness is a longitudinal signal: it measures sustained movement across dimensions between measured snapshots, not a single score. Positive net delta with broad growth areas indicates upward trajectory.

narrative_texts.confidence_level: Confidence: Moderate — based on measured snapshots; rises as more are captured.
